title: Function-Tunnel Intelligence (FTI): Elastic Structural Runtime Intelligence for Robust Autonomous Systems
description: Function-Tunnel Intelligence (FTI) introduces an elastic structural runtime intelligence paradigm for robust autonomous systems. Instead of requiring exact path-following, exact synchronization, or rigid trajectory matching, FTI proposes that intelligent systems should remain inside acceptable structural function-tunnels. The framework combines Time-Series Curve Elastic IR, function-tunnel navigation, behavioral manifold stabilization, policy tunnel governance, and structural corridor matching. It is intended for applications including low-cost drone navigation, robotics, swarm systems, AI runtime governance, structural AI coding, and post-LLM control-plane design.
